rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Establishing Admissions To Written Discovery, To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, January 4, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pneumo Abex LLC¿s motion to deem requests for admission admitted, to compel responses to written discovery and for sanction is denied in full. Plaintiffs established sufficient factual basis for relief from their failure to serve responses when required by the code. Defendant¿s failure to make any meet and confer effort prior to filing the motion, while not required for an order to compel, precludes an award of sanctions in that it cannot be said that the motion was ¿necessitated¿ by plaintiffs¿ inaction. Had defendant made any meet and confer effort, the motion would likely not have had to be filed. = (220/HEK)
